title: Assassin Enchant
description: This adds an enchantment which gives you more experience when killing mobs
body:
# Assassin Enchant
Heyy, this is a simple datapack that adds a new enchantment which gives you more experience when killing mobs
<details>
<summary>1.21</summary>
  
## How does it work
Simple, you kill mobs and it gives more experience but what does this enchantment actually do?
- It has 4 level
- For each level it adds 1 experience spawned
- Can be put on all weapons, which is the sword, the axe and the mace
- It can only be put on the sword through the enchanting table (Level 1 to 3)

## How to obtain the enchantment
The enchantment is found in the enchanting table, via trading with villagers and on random loot.

</details>


## Important message
This datapack is the start of a new project of mine which will include more enchants. Don't hesitate to share any feedback you have

**All my datapacks are compatible**

**You can modify this datapack to your likings. However, I would appreciate if you could credit me if you use my base code, thank you!**

## Planned in the future: The higher on the list, the sooner
- Configuration menu in game
